heading: Required Access
body:
You need the [Project Search Index Editor](<Project Search Index Editor>) or higher role to view
MongoDB Vector Search indexes.

> **Note:** You can use the [mongosh](mongodb-shell) command or driver helper methods to delete
> MongoDB Vector Search indexes on all Atlas cluster tiers. For a list of supported driver
> versions, see Supported Clients.

You need [readWrite](manual/reference/built-in-roles) or higher role to view MongoDB Vector Search indexes.
